title: Sort Multiple Columns
excerpt: Hi! Is there a way to sort multiple columns like you can do in excel. For example I have a column for Sales Rep and then a column for Closing Date. I want to have my board first sort by Sales Rep then sort by Closing Dat…

posts.author: CWaxman (CaraWaxman)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! Is there a way to sort multiple columns like you can do in excel. For example I have a column for Sales Rep and then a column for Closing Date. I want to have my board first sort by Sales Rep then sort by Closing Date. If anyone has any ideas please let me know!! Thanks!

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml: There is a double up & down arrow at the top right hand side of the board screen. If you click on this (instead of using the sort button above each column) you can sort by multiple columns and optionally save it to the current table view.

posts.author: CWaxman (CaraWaxman)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @JCorrell I tried that before posting here and it didn’t work. I must be doing something wrong!

posts.author: CWaxman (CaraWaxman)
posts.cookedHtml: actually seems to be working now! not sure why it wasn’t before. Thanks!!!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
